sqlMap.select:
SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, NVL(title, ' ') AS title, NVL(title2, ' ') AS title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT 'top,Top,' || dept_cd_path FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primary, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt, mobile, extensionattribute5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 as jobId, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 as roleId FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE (cn = #id# OR extensionattribute14 = #id#) AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
and department = NVL(#deptID#, department)
and EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = NVL(#jobId#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7)
password = #password#
UNION SELECT u.cn, u.password, u.displayname, u.displayname2, d.cn department, d.displayname description, d.displayname2 description2, b.title as title, b.title2 as title2, d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 companyid, d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 company, d.COMPNM2 company2, u.updatedt, case u.department when TO_NCHAR(#deptID#) then u.extensionattribute1 else CAST(b.ROLL_INFO AS NVARCHAR2(200)) end as rollinfo, u.telephonenumber, u.mail, u.extensionattribute10 as jikchek, u.tenant_id, concat('top,Top,', d.dept_cd_path) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primary, u.loginCnt, u.extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, u.extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, u.extensionattribute14 as sabun, u.password_updatedt, u.mobile, u.extensionattribute5, CAST(B.JOBID AS NVARCHAR2(200)) as jobId, CAST(B.ROLEID AS NVARCHAR2(200)) as roleId FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER b JOIN TBL_USERMASTER u ON b.CN = u.CN AND b.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID inner join tbl_deptMaster d on (u.tenant_id = d.tenant_id) AND d.CN = b.DEPTID and b.JOBID = #jobId# WHERE (u.cn = #id# OR u.extensionattribute14 = #id#) AND u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.cn = #deptID# and b.jobid = #jobId#
password = #password#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, NVL(title,' ') AS title, NVL(title2, ' ') AS title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT 'top,Top,' || dept_cd_path FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primary, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt, mobile, extensionattribute5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 as jobId, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 as roleId FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE cn = #id# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
and department = NVL(#deptID#, department)
and EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 = NVL(#jobId#, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7)
password = #password#
UNION SELECT u.cn, u.password, u.displayname, u.displayname2, d.cn department, d.displayname description, d.displayname2 description2, b.title as title, b.title2 as title2, d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 companyid, d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 company, d.COMPNM2 company2, u.updatedt, case u.department when TO_NCHAR(#deptID#) then u.extensionattribute1 else CAST(b.ROLL_INFO AS NVARCHAR2(200)) end as rollinfo, u.telephonenumber, u.mail, u.extensionattribute10 as jikchek, u.tenant_id, concat('top,Top,', d.dept_cd_path) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primary, u.loginCnt, u.extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, u.extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, u.extensionattribute14 as sabun, u.password_updatedt, u.mobile u.extensionattribute5, CAST(B.JOBID AS NVARCHAR2(200)) as jobId, CAST(B.ROLEID AS NVARCHAR2(200)) as roleId FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER b JOIN TBL_USERMASTER u ON b.CN = u.CN AND b.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID inner join tbl_deptMaster d on (u.tenant_id = d.tenant_id) AND d.CN = b.DEPTID and b.JOBID = #jobId# WHERE u.cn = #id# AND u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and d.cn = #deptID# and b.jobid = #jobId#
password = #password#
SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn != 'masteradmin' AND password IS NULL
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CONNECTION_INFO( SEQUENCE, USERID, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, TITLE, TITLE2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, CONNECTIP, CONNECTTIME, CONNECTBROWSER, CONNECTOS, CONNECTAGENT, TENANT_ID, STATUS, SESSIONCODE ) VALUES( SEQ_TBL_CONNECTION_INFO.NEXTVAL, #id#, #displayName1#, #displayName2#, #deptID#, #deptName1#, #deptName2#, #title1#, #title2#, #companyID#, #companyName1#, #companyName2#, #ip#, SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), #browser#, #os#, #agent#, #tenantId#, #status#, #sessionCode# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CONNECTION_INFO SET DISCONNECTTIME = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) WHERE SESSIONCODE = #sessionCode# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_CONNECTION_INFO SET SESSIONCODE = #ezSessionId# WHERE SESSIONCODE = #sessionCode# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SESSION( SESSION_ID, LOGINCOOKIE, CREATION_TIME, LAST_ACCESS_TIME, MAX_INACTIVE_INTERVAL ) VALUES( #ezSessionId#, #loginCookie#, SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), (SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = #type# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) )
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_SESSION SET LAST_ACCESS_TIME = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP)
LOGINCOOKIE = #loginCookie#
WHERE SESSION_ID = #ezSessionId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT SESSION_ID, LOGINCOOKIE, CREATION_TIME, LAST_ACCESS_TIME, MAX_INACTIVE_INTERVAL, TRUNC(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - LAST_ACCESS_TIME))*24*60 + EXTRACT(HOUR FROM (SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - LAST_ACCESS_TIME))*60 + EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM (SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - LAST_ACCESS_TIME))) AS TIME_DIFF, TYPE FROM TBL_SESSION WHERE SESSION_ID = #ezSessionId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SESSION WHERE LAST_ACCESS_TIME <= (SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) - NUMTODSINTERVAL(#dbSessionStoragePeriod#, 'DAY'))
sqlMap.select: SELECT FIDO_SESSION_ID, USER_ID, CREATE_TIME, ACCESS_IP, STATUS FROM tbl_fido_session WHERE fido_session_id = #fidoSessionId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_FIDO_SESSION SET STATUS = #status# WHERE FIDO_SESSION_ID = #fidoSessionId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_FIDO_SESSION WHERE CREATE_TIME <= DATE_SUB(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL #fidoStoragePeriod# DAY)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET ipaddress = #ip#, lastlogin = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), logincnt = logincnt + 1 WHERE cn = #id# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET password = #password#, password_updatedt = SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) WHERE cn = #id# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT SERVER_NAME, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_TENANT_SERVERNAME WHERE SERVER_NAME = #serverName#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT 'top,Top,'|| dept_cd_path FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primary, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt, extensionattribute5, extensionattribute7 as JOBID, '' ROLEID FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE cn = #id# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE) AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT 'top,Top,'|| dept_cd_path FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primary, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt, extensionattribute5, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 as JOBID, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 as roleId FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE (DEPARTMENT = #id# OR EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 LIKE '%' || #id# || '%') AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id, (SELECT 'top,Top,'|| dept_cd_path FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primary, loginCnt, extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt, extensionattribute5, extensionattribute7 as JOBID, '' ROLEID FROM TBL_USERMASTER a WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #company_id# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT count(USER_ID) FROM tbl_user_config tuc WHERE USER_ID = #id# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'otpKey' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM tbl_user_config tuc WHERE USER_ID = #id# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'otpKey' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT START_IP, END_IP, START_IP_NUMBER, END_IP_NUMBER, COUNTRY_CODE, COUNTRY_NAME FROM JMOCHA_MAIL_COUNTRYIP WHERE #loginIP# BETWEEN START_IP_NUMBER AND END_IP_NUMBER

SELECT a.cn, a.password, a.displayname, a.displayname2, a.department, a.description, a.description2, a.title, a.title2, a.physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, a.company, a.company2, a.updatedt, a.extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, a.mobile, a.mail, a.extensionattribute10 as jikchek, a.tenant_id, (SELECT 'top,Top,' || dept_cd_path FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE cn = a.department AND tenant_id = #tenantId#) AS deptPathCode, (SELECT property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND UPPER(property_name) = 'PRIMARYLANG') AS primary, a.loginCnt, a.extensionattribute4 as gyumJik, a.extensionattribute2 as userFileUrl, a.extensionattribute14 as sabun, password_updatedt, extensionattribute5 FROM TBL_USERMASTER a LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE b ON a.CN = b.CN AND a.TENANT_ID = b.TENANT_ID WHERE (a.cn = #id# OR LOWER(a.extensionattribute14) = #id#) AND a.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND b.cn IS NULL
password = #password#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_FIND_PWD SET CERTIFICATION = #certification# WHERE SABUN = #sabun# AND CERTIFICATION_NUM = #certificationNum#
sqlMap.select: SELECT sabun , reqDate , certificationNum , certification , phoneNum FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY REQ_DATE DESC) AS RNUM, A.SABUN as sabun , A.REQ_DATE as reqDate , A.CERTIFICATION_NUM as certificationNum , A.CERTIFICATION as certification , A.PHONE_NUM as phoneNum FROM TBL_FIND_PWD A WHERE SABUN = #sabun# ) WHERE RNUM = 1
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET logincnt = logincnt + 1 WHERE cn = #id# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(USERID) FROM TBL_DEV_MASTER WHERE USERID = #CN#
